---
title: Map Explorer
date: '2026-03-26'
description: A Collection of Interactive Maps
categories:
- Geospatial
featured: true
---

[See Gallery](https://noahweidig.com/maps){.nw-btn .nw-btn-primary target="_blank"}

A curated collection of interactive maps showcasing geospatial data and analysis. Browse themed maps to explore geographic patterns and distributions across regions.
